creator: jau@iki.fi
text:
When trying to print a page firefox persistently crashes right after clicking
the print button. Any print links on a web page cause the same result.

OTOH cups-1.5.4 seems to be working fine. So, it should be reasonable to
assume this is something related to firefox only.

Because there is no separate text box for the default system compiler used,
here is the output from "sysctl -n kern.compiler_version" ...

FreeBSD clang version 3.3 (tags/RELEASE_33/final 183502) 20130610

Fix: 

I wish I knew really. ;-)
How-To-Repeat: In my case it has been enough to click the print button.
The page being viewed at the time has made no difference.
The crash has been consistent and immediate.
